message:
feat(atc): Track 12 — predictive coordination intelligence

ThreadParticipationGraph tracks which agents share threads to identify
high-conflict-risk pairs. probe_information_gain() uses Shannon entropy
to prioritize probes toward the most uncertain agents, avoiding wasted
probes on confident assessments. 8 new tests, 90 total passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
